name: Gameye
description: Game server orchestration platform that deploys dedicated multiplayer servers globally via a single REST API with BYO-cloud support.

seo.title: Gameye — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Gameye: Game server orchestration platform that deploys dedicated multiplayer servers globally via a single REST API with BYO-cloud support.

when_to_use: Dedicated game server deployment via REST API worldwide
BYO-cloud multiplayer server orchestration for studios
Scaling game sessions across multiple cloud providers globally
Low-latency game server allocation without managed infra lock-in
Replacing Hathora or Edgegap with your own cloud accounts

cons: Layered pricing on top of compute
review.verdict: A pragmatic game server orchestrator if BYO-cloud and portability matter more than cheapest cost.
review.best_for: Studios wanting one API to run dedicated servers across multiple clouds
review.not_for: Teams fine being locked into a single cloud or host

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
